title: Can the folders in Favorites remain collapsed when opening a new tab?
excerpt: I love the new Favorites feature! As the CEO of my company, it allows me to easily access different parts of my business. However, I was wondering if it would be possible to keep the folders collapsed when opening a new …

posts.author: Lumexx (Marco Medina)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the new Favorites feature! As the CEO of my company, it allows me to easily access different parts of my business. However, I was wondering if it would be possible to keep the folders collapsed when opening a new tab. Currently, I find myself having to close them all to focus on just the one I was working on.
